comment: 24yo male whose mother had cerebellar hemangioblastoma at 34 and bilateral pheochromocytoma at 38. Father healthy. No personal symptoms. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = pre-test counseling + germline VHL gene panel; alternative = empirical VHL-protocol surveillance (MRI brain+spine q1y from age 15, MRI abdomen q1-2y, ophthalmology q1y, catecholamines/metanephrines q1y). Validates v0.2-B VHL hereditary pilot. Father-with-kidney-cancer scenario the project initiator highlighted is the canonical clinical motivation.
